@@up_count@@ of @@probe_total@@ probed targets are up. Down: \textcolor{accent}{\textbf{@@down_descs@@}}.
The GPU inference node Compute-A is offline and is not registered in the
catalog. The control plane (both Proxmox APIs and the gateway) is fully
reachable. All-on typical draw is modeled at
@@all_on_typical_kw@@\,kW $\approx$
\$@@all_on_usd_per_month@@/month at \$@@tariff_usd_per_kwh@@/kWh; capex is
seeded largely with estimates pending invoices. NetBox and hardware-level
collectors (Redfish, PDU, LLDP, SNMP) are the main architecture gaps.
